basic_info.title: Final Fantasy VII
basic_info.review: A landmark title that set new industry standards for cinematic storytelling and 3D graphics, praised for its emotional depth and memorable characters.

play_today.details: The definitive way to play Final Fantasy VII. The 2025 Steam release includes native controller support, cloud saves, and full mod compatibility via 7th Heaven mod manager. Use mods for 60 FPS, widescreen, HD textures, voice acting, and improved audio for the ultimate experience.

recommended_patches.name: 7th Heaven Mod Manager
recommended_patches.description: Essential mod manager that virtualizes game files and loads mods on the fly without modifying originals. Required for installing most other mods.

recommended_patches.name: 60/30 FPS Gameplay
recommended_patches.description: Removes the 15 FPS cap in FMVs and 30 FPS cap in battles, enabling smooth 60 FPS gameplay throughout. Created by Vertex2995, Obesebear, and Kaldarasha.

recommended_patches.name: Cosmos Limit Break
recommended_patches.description: True widescreen support with AI-assisted outpainting that fills black bars with upscaled background content. Provides genuine widescreen experience beyond simple stretching.

recommended_patches.name: FF7Music / VGMStream
recommended_patches.description: Replaces MIDI soundtrack with high-fidelity remastered audio and accurate PSX audio emulation. Configurable via 7th Heaven's Music Option setting.

recommended_patches.name: Ninostyle Battle Models
recommended_patches.description: High-quality HD character models for battles. Replaces original low-poly sprites with detailed 3D models while maintaining the original art style.

recommended_patches.name: SYW Unified Textures
recommended_patches.description: AI-upscaled HD textures and backgrounds for every element including fields, menus, fonts, spells, and minigames. Significantly improves visual clarity.

recommended_patches.name: Cosmos Gaia
recommended_patches.description: Adds analog movement, real-time lighting, and improved particle effects to the overworld fields for enhanced immersion.

recommended_patches.name: TrueMotion 2 Codec
recommended_patches.description: Required codec for playing FMVs without black screens on modern Windows systems. Essential for proper video playback.

recommended_patches.name: Cosmos FMV
recommended_patches.description: Replaces baked-in character models in select FMVs with updated versions. Improves visual quality in cutscenes.

recommended_patches.name: Voice Acting Mod
recommended_patches.description: Adds unofficial English voice acting to the game for enhanced immersion. Various voice acting mods available in the catalog.

play_today.details: The best console option for the original game. It features a 1080p upscaling, widescreen support, and includes the Yuffie chapter. While it lacks the extensive modding capabilities of the PC version, it offers a convenient, plug-and-play experience with cloud saves and modern controller support without needing external hardware.
Same remaster as PS4 version with additional convenience features including save states, photo mode, and improved UI. Ideal for portable play on Switch.
Mobile port of the original game with touch controls and cloud save support. Good for casual play but lacks the modding capabilities of PC.
Original PlayStation version running on modern systems via emulator. Best for purists wanting the authentic 1997 experience with optional enhancements.

The definitive modern experience for the original 1997 game. The Steam version includes the PC-exclusive Yuffie chapter and offers native widescreen support. Crucially, it has the most robust modding community, allowing for HD texture packs, UI overhauls, and QoL fixes like auto-save and difficulty adjustments that are impossible on console ports.

recommended_patches.name: 7th Heaven Mod Manager
recommended_patches.description: Essential mod manager for the PC version that enables installation of HD texture packs, widescreen support, and quality-of-life fixes like auto-save and difficulty adjustments.

recommended_patches.name: FF7 HD Project
recommended_patches.description: Comprehensive mod for the PC version adding high-definition textures, widescreen support, and various quality-of-life improvements to the original 1997 game.

recommended_patches.name: FF7 UI Overhaul
recommended_patches.description: Modernizes the user interface for the PC version to improve readability and add native controller support.

recommended_patches.name: Final Fantasy VII Retranslation Mod
recommended_patches.description: A fan translation patch for the PC version that restores content cut from the English localization and improves dialogue accuracy to match the Japanese original.

play_today.details: The authentic 1997 experience for purists. While it lacks widescreen support and modern QoL features, it offers the original soundtrack and visual style exactly as intended. Best played via emulation or original hardware for historical accuracy, though the lack of save states on original hardware can be a drawback for modern players.

recommended_patches.name: Final Fantasy VII Bugfix and Uncensoring Patch
recommended_patches.description: A patch for the original PlayStation ROM that fixes the 'Lucca's Gun' glitch, restores censored content like the Lizard Man sprite, and corrects translation errors.

optimal_settings: Enable NTSC mode for correct timing and color accuracy
Use texture filtering (bilinear) for smoother sprite scaling
Configure save states to auto-save every 5 minutes
Internal resolution: 2x-3x for balanced performance and clarity
Enable NTSC mode for correct timing and color accuracy
Use texture filtering (bilinear) for smoother sprite scaling
Configure touch controls overlay with custom button mapping

description.synopsis: In a world where the mega-conglomerate Shinra Inc. drains the planet's life energy (Mako) for power, a group of eco-terrorists known as Avalanche attempts to stop them. The story follows Cloud Strife, a mercenary with a troubled past, who joins the resistance and uncovers a conspiracy involving an ancient weapon and a mysterious girl named Aerith. As the group fights against Shinra and the alien entity Sephiroth, they must confront the truth about Cloud's identity and the fate of the planet.
key_features: Active Time Battle (ATB) system with real-time movement
Materia system for customizable magic and abilities
Summons: Giant creatures with cinematic attack animations
Non-linear world map exploration with fast travel
Party-based character progression and equipment management
Complex narrative with multiple character arcs
Boss battles with unique mechanics and phases
Mini-games including chocobo racing and fishing
legacy_and_impact: Final Fantasy VII is widely considered one of the greatest video games of all time, credited with popularizing the JRPG genre in the West. Its release on the PlayStation demonstrated the console's power and shifted the industry focus toward CD-based media and cinematic storytelling.
